item.title: FBI Warns of Rising Cybercrime and Real-World Violence from Youth Network “The Com” #1836
item.description: The FBI has issued an urgent warning about “The Com,” a rapidly expanding network of youth aged 11–25 who are engaged in both cyber and…

item.title: Self-Destructing SSD for Ultimate Data Security #1832
item.description: TeamGroup has launched the P250Q-M80 SSD, a specialized drive that can physically destroy its flash memory by pressing a button. Designed for…

item.title: Trump Blasts Elon Musk as “Crazy,” Threatens to Cut Billions in Contracts

item.title: FCC Targets Chinese Testing Labs Over Security Concerns in US Electronics #1818
item.description: The Federal Communications Commission is gearing up for a crucial vote on May 22 that could reshape how electronics enter the U.S. market. At the…
